shortDescription: Bright 1-bedroom condo in Scarborough City Centre with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 190 Borough Drive, Unit 812 in the vibrant Scarborough City Centre neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 1 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
